app.name: Instance Config Migrator
app.short_description: Export and import Zendesk configuration bundles.
app.long_description: A private admin tool for exporting Zendesk configuration from one instance and importing it into another through a dry-run, review, approval, and execution workflow.
app.installation_instructions: Install the app as a private Zendesk Support app. Open the app from the Zendesk Support navigation bar. Use Export mode in the source instance to generate a migration bundle. Use Import mode in the target instance to upload the bundle, run a dry-run, review the plan, confirm, execute the import, and download the report.
